title: Title — Del Bar Wine & Dine
description: Hero title slide with wine imagery and platform introduction.

title: The Problem
description: Guest-facing gaps and operational friction in restaurant wine programs.

description: Overview of the three platform pillars: catalog, pairing engine, admin tools.

title: Wine Catalog
description: 66 wines across 8 categories, with by-glass availability.

title: Food Menu
description: 37 Middle Eastern dishes with bidirectional pairing.

title: Wine Profiles
description: Tasting profile, aroma notes, and serving guidance for each wine.

description: Inventory management — stock control and secure access.

description: Platform architecture: classification engine, scoring algorithm, live data.

title: Sales Impact
description: +20–30% average check increase from guided wine recommendations.

title: Revenue Forecast
description: Projected annual revenue lift: $162K–$243K based on 1,500 covers/month.

title: Guest Experience
description: Confidence at every table — staff, guests, and onboarding benefits.

title: Platform at a Glance
description: Key stats: 66 wines, 37 dishes, 2,442 pairings, 99% pairing coverage.

title: Closing
